problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: If Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor is applied to in, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
